settings.heading: Returns and Refunds
settings.subheading: At AmiriVibes, we handle returns and refunds in a clear and fair manner. Eligibility depends on the service selected and the condition of the item.
settings.side_left_heading: IF THE ISSUE IS ON OUR SIDE
settings.side_left_subheading: In the event that an item arrives incorrect, damaged, or with a defect attributable to AmiriVibes:
settings.side_right_subheading: For returns not resulting from an error on our part:
settings.refund_text: Once your return is received, it will be inspected to confirm it meets all eligibility conditions. Refunds are approved only after this inspection is complete. Approved refunds are issued to the original payment method used at the time of purchase.

settings.title: Qatar Collection
settings.description: Returns are accepted within 10 days of the delivery date. Items must be unused, unworn, and returned in original packaging.

settings.title: Return Eligibility
settings.intro: We want every purchase to be right. If something is not, we are here to make it easy.
settings.bullets: Returns are accepted within 10 days of the confirmed delivery date.||Items must be unused, unworn, and returned in their original packaging with all accessories, tags, and branded materials intact.||Requests made outside the 10-day window will not be eligible.

settings.text: A full refund will be issued without question.
All return delivery costs are covered entirely by AmiriVibes.
Returns may still be accepted for eligible items within the 10-day window.
Return shipping or collection costs are the customer's responsibility.
